Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Won, esq. (650-245-6457) for Defendant.
No other appearances.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NO MORE DIRT, INC.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED as moot; no sanctions.

Defendant/Prevailing party to send proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to tom@thomascohen.com

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
